Donald Trump fired Bondi as the US Attorney General Pam on April 2, after just over a year in office.

topStories.title: Pawan Khera accuses Assam CM Himanta of using the police to silence questions
topStories.description: In a recorded video message from an undisclosed location, the Congress leader says his party has only sought answers and would continue to do so

topStories.title: Iran Strait of Hormuz warning adds to shipping uncertainty
topStories.description: Only a few vessels have crossed the strait since the US-Iran ceasefire deal, according to BBC Verify analysis.

topStories.title: Donald Trump says only one set of terms acceptable in US-Iran talks: ‘These are the POINTS…’
topStories.description: In his latest post on TRUTH Social, Trump said, “There is only one group of meaningful ‘POINTS’ that are acceptable to the United States…”

dailyNews.title: Trump says Lebanon not part of US-Iran ceasefire, but ‘will get taken care of’ - Report
dailyNews.description: US President Trump said that their ceasefire with Iran applies specifically to the US-Iran conflict. When asked about Israel’s ongoing military operations in Lebanon, the President described the situation as “a separate skirmish.”

dailyNews.title: Academicians appeal to President to intervene in Supreme Court textbook row
dailyNews.description: By forcefully intervening in what is essentially an educational matter, threatening criminal contempt of court and banishing respected educationists without hearing them, the Supreme Court, had encroached upon academic freedom, the letter says

dailyNews.title: Oil prices plunge and shares jump on US-Iran ceasefire plan
dailyNews.description: Crude prices tumbled by more than 15% on the conditional pause but remain far higher than before the war.

dailyNews.title: Centre Says Time To Remove PIL As Concept; Supreme Court Says "We're Cautious"

dailyNews.title: ‘Urge all parties to exercise restraint’: Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif says amid reports of US-Iran ceasefire violations
dailyNews.description: Despite a 15-day ceasefire, Iran and Israel continue to attack each other. Israel targeted Iranian missile sites, while Iran retaliated with missile strikes on regional allies. Iran may withdraw from the ceasefire if attacks persist, as peace talks with the US are set to proceed in Pakistan.

dailyNews.title: Lavan refinery blaze continues hours after US-Iran ceasefire agreement - Al Jazeera
dailyNews.description: Lavan refinery blaze continues hours after US-Iran ceasefire agreement  Al Jazeera

dailyNews.title: Pakistan stocks see biggest-ever surge after US-Iran ceasefire, KSE 100 jumps 12,000 points
dailyNews.description: Pakistan’s stock market surged sharply after a temporary ceasefire between the United States and Iran eased tensions. The rally triggered a trading halt amid volatility, reversing earlier losses, as improved sentiment and hopes of diplomatic progress lifted investor confidence.

dailyNews.title: What Trump Has Accomplished in Iran After 5 Weeks of War
dailyNews.description: President Trump said “we have already met and exceeded” his military objectives. But his goals are largely unresolved.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices plunge after Trump announces ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Oil prices plunged on Wednesday after President Trump announced a 2-week ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran. CBS News business analyst Jill Schlesinger has more.

dailyNews.title: Iran says Israel violating ceasefire as it keeps grip on Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Iran says Israel is violating the ceasefire deal President Trump announced, and Tehran appears to still have control over shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: U.S stocks rally, oil prices tumble after Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Investors cheered the announcement of a two-week ceasefire, which President Trump said is contingent on the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Pete Hegseth says "we'll be hanging around" after Iran ceasefire announcement
dailyNews.description: Wednesday's briefing came after President Trump announced late Tuesday that he had agreed to "suspend the bombing and attack of Iran for a period of two weeks."

dailyNews.title: H.R. McMaster says there won't be enduring peace in Iran unless there's fundamental regime change
dailyNews.description: President Trump's former adviser and CBS News contributor H.R. McMaster joins CBS News 24/7 Mornings to weigh in on the two-week ceasefire deal between the U.S. and Iran.

dailyNews.title: First ships pass Strait of Hormuz since Trump-Iran ceasefire, but traffic remains low amid confusion
dailyNews.description: Iran is reportedly planning to demand that shipping firms pay tolls in cryptocurrency to let their oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens tariffs of 50% on countries 'supplying military weapons to Iran'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says the U.S. will impose tariffs of 50% on goods imported to the country from any nation "supplying military weapons to Iran."

dailyNews.title: JD Vance calls Iran ceasefire a 'fragile truce' and says Trump is 'impatient to make progress'
dailyNews.description: The U.S. vice president said the response from Iran to the ceasefire had varied, with some 'lying about even the fragile truce that we've already struck.'

dailyNews.title: Alphabet, Meta, Amazon, Nvidia lead tech rally after Trump announces ceasefire with Iran
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump's Iran ceasefire announcement provided some relief to Wall Street and tech stocks shared in the rally.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices plunge after Iran agrees to safe passage through Strait of Hormuz during ceasefire
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump agreed to the ceasefire with Iran after discussions with Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif.

dailyNews.title: Ray Dalio: Trump-Xi meeting to focus on trade, capital flows
dailyNews.description: Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio told CNBC he is optimistic about the outcome of a meeting  between the U.S. and Chinese presidents next month.
